title: calliandra inermis subsp. alamosensis
intro: Calliandra inermis subsp. alamosensis is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the Mexican Powder Puff or Pink Powder Puff. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as wounds and skin conditions. The leaves and flowers of Calliandra inermis subsp. alamosensis have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder for herbal remedies, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
